name: system-design
description: Cloud-agnostic system design across AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, and Cloudflare — a six-step loop (requirements → capacity estimation → architecture → cloud service selection → Well-Architected review → design doc) grounded in the hyperscalers' Well-Architected frameworks, with each cloud's live documentation MCP (when connected) verifying fast-moving service facts alongside the bundled cheat-sheets. Auto-engages via the 'system-design' skill whenever you architect or scale a system, choose or compare cloud services, size capacity, or review a design; slash-available as /system-design:system-design.
